tree.name: Mark Williams
tree.tradeDescription: PHX traded Liam McNeeley, Vasilije Micic, and a 2029 1st round pick (least favorable of CLE/UTA/MIN) to CHA for Mark Williams and a 2029 2nd round pick (PHO own). PHX also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Liam McNeeley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 29th overall by Phoenix (pick acquired from Utah, originally Cleveland's)

assetsGivenUp.name: Vasilije Micić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: PHX traded Jusuf Nurkic to CHA for Cody Martin and Vasilije Micic. PHX also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jusuf Nurkić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: PHX sent Deandre Ayton and Toumani Camara to POR; MIL sent Grayson Allen to PHX, Jrue Holiday and 3 1st-round picks to POR; POR sent Damian Lillard to MIL, Jusuf Nurkic, Nassir Little, and Keon Johnson to PHX

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Least favorable of CLE, UTA, MIN picks; acquired from Utah on Jan 21, 2025 (PHX sent 2031 1st PHO own to UTA for 2025 1st, 2027 1st, 2029 1st)
